_note: Personal filler dictionary — phrases removed from the script before cutting. Word-aware: each phrase matches whole words regardless of surrounding punctuation or case, so 'you know' catches 'You know,' / 'you know.' / ' you know ' with one entry. Longest phrase wins, so 'you know what i mean' beats 'you know'. GUARDRAIL: only unambiguous fillers — never add a word said legitimately ('like' is 91% legitimate in real data; 'kind of' is 64%). Becomes the per-user filler_rule table in KMBO-264.
